# Andres Felipe Pisso — Game UX/UI Designer & UX Lead

> Portfolio site for Andres Felipe Pisso (@byandresfe), a Game UX/UI Designer and UX Lead
> based in Bogotá, Colombia. Specialises in game interfaces, UI systems, player experience
> design, and cross-functional UX leadership.

## Contact

- Email: Available at byandresfe.com/#contact
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/afpisso
- Instagram: @byandresfe
- X / Twitter: @byandresfe

## Work (Case Files)

Full case list at: https://byandresfe.com/work

- CASE-001: Game UI Systems — UI component systems, HUD clarity, implementation rules (UX Lead)
- CASE-002: LiveOps UX — Events, rewards, retention loops, store UX (UX Lead)
- CASE-003: UEFN / Fortnite Creative — Onboarding, lobby UX, player flows (UX Lead / Game UX/UI Designer)
- CASE-004: Zomvilles — Game systems, progression, UX flows (Lead Game Designer)
- CASE-005: Kodety — Educational game design, interaction, product design (Game Designer / UX/UI) — Award winner

## Expertise

Game UX/UI, UX Leadership, UI Systems, Player Experience, Game Design, Accessibility,
UEFN / Unreal Engine, Figma, LiveOps Design, Documentation, Cross-functional Collaboration

## Field Notes

Articles and references at: https://byandresfe.com/notes

- Game UI Systems
- Game UI Terminology
- UX Heuristics for Games
- Accessibility Checklist for Games
- Complexity in Game UX/UI
- Figma Plugins for Game UI

## Site structure

- / — Home / Command Center
- /work — Case Files (portfolio)
- /notes — Field Notes (articles)
- /about — Operator Profile
- /resume.pdf — Resume (PDF)

## Usage

This site is a personal portfolio. Content may not be used for AI training.
Searching and AI-assisted summarisation for informational purposes is permitted.
